TextView.android:text: By creating an account with Maestro Autoworks, you agree to provide accurate vehicle and identity information, present valid documents upon request, and abide by our appointment and cancellation policies. Falsified details may result in account suspension.

CheckBox.android:text: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service

TextView.android:text: Maestro Autoworks requires a valid driver's license to book services. This helps us verify your identity and ensure the safety of all our customers.
Do you have a valid driver's license?

RadioButton.android:text: ✔ Yes, I have a valid driver's license

TextView.android:text: A valid driver's license is required to register with Maestro Autoworks.\n\nPlease obtain your driver's license from the Land Transportation Office (LTO) first, then return to complete your registration.

CheckBox.android:text: I also have a Conductor's License

TextView.android:text: Take a clear photo of your driver's license front. Our system will read the license number and cross-check it with what you entered.
Tell us a bit about yourself.
How can we reach you? Your email will also be used to sign in.
Please review your information before setting your password.
Choose a strong password to protect your account.
Already have an account? Sign In
